segments.text: Hear a just cause, O LORD; attend to my cry! Give ear to my prayer from lips without deceit!
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: not…: Heb. without lips of deceit

segments.text: From your presence let my vindication come! Let your eyes behold the right!
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: You have tried my heart, you have visited me by night, you have tested me, and you will find nothing; I have purposed that my mouth will not transgress.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: With regard to the works of man, by the word of your lips I have avoided the ways of the violent.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: My steps have held fast to your paths; my feet have not slipped.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I call upon you, for you will answer me, O God; incline your ear to me; hear my words.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Wondrously show your steadfast love, O Savior of those who seek refuge from their adversaries at your right hand.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: by thy…: or, them which trust in thee from those that rise up against thy right hand

segments.text: Keep me as the apple of your eye; hide me under the shadow of your wings,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: from the wicked who oppress me, my deadly enemies who surround me.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: my…: Heb. my enemies against the soul

segments.text: They close up their callous hearts, and with their mouths they speak proudly.
They have now surrounded our steps; they set their eyes to cast us down to the ground.
He is like a lion eager to tear, as a young lion lurking in ambush.

footnotes: Like…: Heb. The likeness of him (that is, of every one of them) is as a lion that desireth to ravin

segments.text: Arise, O LORD! Confront him, make him bow down; deliver my soul from the wicked by your sword,
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: from men by your hand, O LORD, from men of the world whose portion is in this life. You fill their womb with treasure; they are satisfied with children and leave their abundance to their infants.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: they…: or, their children are full

segments.text: As for me, I shall behold your face in righteousness; when I awake, I shall be satisfied with your likeness.
segments.speaker: David
